notes: Consumer article — no primary studies linked directly; replaced with peer-reviewed references.
Fiber-mortality meta-analysis; provides the mortality-reduction evidence for legumes including black beans
2023 systematic review and dose-response meta-analysis; 36 cohorts >1.1M participants; legumes reduce all-cause and stroke mortality
Multicenter randomized crossover RCT; daily canned beans decrease serum total and LDL cholesterol in adults with elevated LDL
Systematic review and meta-analysis of anthocyanin supplementation; reduced LDL and triglycerides increased HDL; supports black bean pigment cardiovascular claims
JAMA Internal Medicine RCT; legume-rich low-GI diet reduced A1C and LDL in type 2 diabetes vs high-fiber controls
